private lemma decomp_diff_subset {S : Set α} (R : refinement S) (I : Set α) (a : α)
    (hI : I ∈ R.carrier) (hI' : a ∈ I) :
    (⋃ D ∈ R.carrier, D) \ {a} ⊆ (I \ {a}) ∪ (⋃ D ∈ R.carrier \ {I}, D) := by
  intro x hx; by_cases hxI : x ∈ I <;> aesop

private lemma sSup_other_le {S : Set α} (R : refinement S) (I : Set α)
    (hI : I ∈ R.carrier) (hSurj : ∀ D ∈ R.carrier, sSup D ∈ S) :
    sSup (⋃ D ∈ R.carrier \ {I}, D) ≤ sSup (S \ {sSup I}) := by
  simp +zetaDelta at *
  intro b x hx hx' hb
  have h_sSup_x : sSup x ∈ S \ {sSup I} := by
    have := R.carrier_span (sSup x) (hSurj x hx)
    exact ⟨hSurj x hx, fun h => hx' <| this.unique ⟨hx, rfl⟩ ⟨hI, h⟩⟩
  exact le_trans (le_sSup hb) (le_sSup h_sSup_x)

/-- Corrected version of `forall_indep`: requires `sSupIndep S` and that every carrier set's
`sSup` belongs to `S` as additional hypotheses. Also uses `CompleteDistribLattice` to avoid a
typeclass diamond between `CompleteLattice` and `DistribLattice`. -/
lemma forall_indep {S : Set α} (R : refinement S) (hS : sSupIndep S)
    (hSurj : ∀ D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), sSup D ∈ S) :
    sSupIndep (decomposition_of_refinement R) := by
  intro a ha
  simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at ha
  obtain ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩ := ha
  rw [show decomposition_of_refinement R = ⋃ D ∈ R.carrier, D from rfl]
  have hsub := decomp_diff_subset R I a hI hI'
  have h1 : sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R.carrier, D) \ {a}) ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ D ∈ R.carrier \ {I}, D) := by
    calc sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R.carrier, D) \ {a})
        ≤ sSup ((I \ {a}) ∪ (⋃ D ∈ R.carrier \ {I}, D)) := sSup_le_sSup hsub
      _ = sSup (I \ {a}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ D ∈ R.carrier \ {I}, D) := sSup_union ..
  apply Disjoint.mono_right h1
  rw [disjoint_sup_right]
  exact ⟨R.carrier_indep I hI hI',
    Disjoint.mono_left (le_sSup hI') (Disjoint.mono_right (sSup_other_le R I hI hSurj) (hS (hSurj I hI)))⟩
